concurrency.caveat: W&B start markers and completion times are logged-run intervals, not exact allocation timestamps.

public_development_analysis.interpretation: Secondary treatment-minus-base is nominal p=.125, but primary treatment-minus-signflip is p=.625 and the shape gate fails at 5->6; target evidence is false. Adaptive development evidence only.

seed195_lineage.fresh_v14_difference: Fresh seeds 236-239, six updates, evaluation every update, and exact seed-matched sign-flip controls; no seed195 model state reused.

source_boundary.config_reconstruction: Eight resolved configs are included; the claim/completions bind source config, registration, metric-schema, code, lens, calibration, curve-index, and exclusion hashes.
